description: Composition Half sleeves shirt with red and blue plaid checks with black and white accents, made of 100% cotton, has buttoned patch pockets on both chests with stud detailing, full length buttoned placket and a curved hemline with attached loops Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine/hand wash in cold water at 30 C with mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron When it's Thursday and you want to wear something that's not formal, but not casual either, try this semi-formal checked shirt from scullers. The shirt looks fresh and crisp and will keep you cool all day long. Pair it with corduroys for a relaxed look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
